tournament.name: Fuguete Champ 278 - Play Point P/ Top 10

decks.notes: This deck focuses on using various control spells and creatures to disrupt and control the opponent's strategy while efficiently drawing through the deck and filling the graveyard. The key strategy involves using cheap counterspells and removal spells to maintain board control, while leveraging the graveyard with cards like Gurmag Angler and Tolarian Terror. The deck also includes ways to gain card advantage through drawing and filtering cards, as well as disrupting the opponent's graveyard strategies with cards like Bojuka Bog. Ultimately, the goal is to outvalue the opponent and control the game until victory.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and direct damage spells. By maximizing the use of low-cost creatures and burn spells, the deck aims to apply constant pressure and finish off the opponent before they have a chance to stabilize. The inclusion of cards like Faithless Looting and Grab the Prize helps to maintain card advantage and find the necessary cards to close out the game efficiently. Overall, this deck aims to win the game through efficient and relentless aggression.

The main focus of this Dimir Control deck is to disrupt your opponent's plans while establishing board control through removal spells and countermagic. It also aims to generate card advantage with cards like Brainstorm and Lórien Revealed, as well as token production with Murmuring Mystic. The deck utilizes powerful removal spells like Snuff Out and Cast Down to deal with threats efficiently, while also having access to hand disruption with Abandon Attachments. Overall, the deck aims to stall the game and outvalue the opponent to secure a victory.

The deck focuses on quickly flooding the board with low-cost, aggressive creatures like Goblin Bushwhacker and Voldaren Epicure, supporting them with burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Galvanic Blast to deal direct damage to the opponent. The deck aims to finish off the opponent swiftly by overwhelming them with a combination of creature aggression and direct damage spells. It also includes cards like Reckless Impulse and Rally at the Hornburg to maintain card advantage and keep the pressure on the opponent.

This deck focuses on quickly deploying artifacts and creatures with the Affinity ability, allowing for explosive early game plays. Utilizing cheap spells and creatures, the goal is to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive attacks and burn spells. The deck also includes card draw and mana ramping to maintain momentum throughout the game. With a mix of artifact synergy and direct damage, this Aggro-Affinity deck aims to swiftly close out the game before the opponent can establish their own strategy.

This deck focuses on putting pressure on the opponent early with aggressive creatures and utilizing sacrifice effects to gain advantage. By combining cheap creatures like Krark-Clan Shaman and Refurbished Familiar with powerful spells like Cast Down and Toxin Analysis, the deck aims to control the board while dealing consistent damage. The inclusion of cards like Nihil Spellbomb and Cleansing Wildfire provide additional utility and disruption, giving the deck versatility in different matchups. Additionally, the combination of ramp cards like Ichor Wellspring and removal spells make it difficult for opponents to stabilize, ultimately leading to a swift victory.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive red creatures and direct damage spells. By maintaining a fast pace and applying constant pressure, the deck aims to eliminate the opponent's life total before they have a chance to stabilize their board. With a mix of efficient creatures and powerful burn spells, the strategy is to push for a quick victory through relentless aggression and efficient use of resources. The deck aims to win through speed and efficient card advantage provided by the creatures and spells included.

This deck focuses on flooding the board with low-cost creatures and using auras and equipment to buff them up quickly. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with a swarm of strong, evasive creatures while maintaining a tight curve and aggressive gameplay. The deck includes cards that provide additional protection and evasion to its creatures, ensuring that they can deal damage efficiently and effectively. The strategy relies on establishing a strong board presence early on and leveraging the synergy between creatures and auras to close out the game swiftly.

This deck focuses on quickly bringing out multiple artifact creatures and using artifacts to boost their power and provide utility. By efficiently casting cheap creatures like Glint Hawk and Kor Skyfisher, as well as using artifacts like Blood Fountain and Cryogen Relic, the goal is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive strategy. Cards like Thoughtcast provide card advantage, while removal spells like Cast Down and Thraben Charm help control the board. The mana base prioritizes artifact lands and bridges to ensure smooth mana production for the deck's spells and abilities.

The deck is focused on utilizing the Balustrade Spy combo to fill the graveyard with creatures and then use Dread Return to bring back a powerful creature like Lotleth Giant. The deck also includes cards like Winding Way and Lead the Stampede to help find combo pieces quickly. The strategy involves ramping with creatures like Elves of Deep Shadow and Overgrown Battlement to get ahead early and overwhelm the opponent with a strong board presence. The deck relies on synergy between creatures and spells to create a powerful and explosive combo finish.

The deck focuses on controlling the game through counter spells, removal, card draw, and graveyard hate. It aims to stall the game until it can establish board control with cards like Murmuring Mystic and Evincar's Justice. The inclusion of Mystical Teachings allows for versatile tutor options, while cards like Counterspell and Cast Down offer protection and removal. The deck also includes a variety of bounce lands to ensure consistent mana production. Overall, the deck aims to outlast the opponent and win through attrition and card advantage.

This Gruul Aggro deck focuses on ramping up mana quickly with Arbor Elf, Utopia Sprawl, and Wild Growth to cast big creatures like Eldrazi Repurposer, Annoyed Altisaur, and Sagu Wildling. Writhing Chrysalis and Boarding Party provide additional threats, while Malevolent Rumble can clear the way for your creatures to attack. Thunderhead Gunner offers direct damage to finish off opponents, and Mwonvuli Acid-Moss disrupts your opponent's mana base. With a focus on speed and aggression, this deck aims to overwhelm opponents before they can stabilize.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and burn spells. By playing efficient creatures like Voldaren Epicure and Sneaky Snacker, along with direct damage spells like Lightning Bolt and Fireblast, the goal is to deplete the opponent's life total as quickly as possible. Cards like Faithless Looting and Grab the Prize help to dig for more threats or burn spells, ensuring a steady stream of damage. Highway Robbery can provide additional reach if the game goes long, making this deck a potent Aggro-Burn archetype in Pauper 1 vs 1 format.

This Pauper Mono Black Aggro deck focuses on creating a swarm of low-cost creatures to overwhelm opponents quickly. Utilizing cards like Mortician Beetle and Carrion Feeder to grow with sacrificed creatures, along with removal spells like Village Rites and Supernatural Stamina to maintain momentum. The deck also includes some recursion with Unearth and Ghoulcaller's Chant to keep the pressure on opponents. Rite of Consumption can be used as a finisher to deal direct damage based on the number of sacrificed creatures.

The main idea of this Mono Green Aggro deck is to overwhelm the opponent quickly with aggressive creatures like Nyxborn Hydra and Avenging Hunter, supported by ramp spells like Arbor Elf and Utopia Sprawl. Writhing Chrysalis and Eldrazi Repurposer provide additional threats and utility. Ram Through serves as removal and finisher, while Malevolent Rumble can clear the opponent's board. The deck aims to build a wide board presence and end the game swiftly with powerful attacks, utilizing the strength of green creatures and efficient mana acceleration.

This deck focuses on utilizing Persistent Petitioners as a win condition by overwhelming the opponent with a high volume of creature spells. The deck also includes cards like Vitalize and Lead the Stampede to help draw and cast multiple Petitioners quickly. Support cards like Masked Vandal and Sibsig Appraiser provide additional removal and card advantage. The goal is to assemble a critical mass of Petitioners to mill out the opponent's deck and win the game.
